# text_diff


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## Install

``` sh
pip install git+https://github.com/hugobellamy/text_diff.git
```

## Compute a diff

``` python
compute_diff("the old cat sat", "the new cat lay")
```

    [{'type': 'equal', 'text': 'the '},
     {'type': 'replace', 'old_text': 'old', 'new_text': 'new'},
     {'type': 'equal', 'text': ' cat '},
     {'type': 'replace', 'old_text': 'sat', 'new_text': 'lay'}]

## Full pipeline (no LLM)

``` python
await process_diff(
    "The old cat sat on the mat.",
    "The new cat lay on the mat.",
    semantic_grouping=False
)
```

    [{'type': 'equal', 'text': 'The ', 'accepted': True},
     {'type': 'replace', 'old_text': 'old', 'new_text': 'new', 'accepted': False},
     {'type': 'equal', 'text': ' cat ', 'accepted': True},
     {'type': 'replace', 'old_text': 'sat', 'new_text': 'lay', 'accepted': False},
     {'type': 'equal', 'text': ' on the mat.', 'accepted': True}]

## Track and accept changes

``` python
doc = DocumentState()
doc.add_segments([
    {"id": "1", "text": "The ", "segment_type": "keep", "explanation": "", "accepted": True},
    {"id": "2", "text": "old ", "segment_type": "remove", "explanation": "replacing", "accepted": False},
    {"id": "3", "text": "new ", "segment_type": "add", "explanation": "replacing", "accepted": False},
    {"id": "4", "text": "cat.", "segment_type": "keep", "explanation": "", "accepted": True},
])

print("before:", doc.get_working_text())
doc.accept_segment("2", "add")  # accept the new text
print("after: ", doc.get_working_text())
```

    before: The old cat.
    after:  The new cat.

## LLM-powered rewrite + diff

Requires an [OpenRouter](https://openrouter.ai/) API key.

``` python
result = await request_text_improvement(
    "make it more concise",
    "The cat sat on the mat and looked around the room slowly.",
    api_key="sk-or-..."
)
```
